title: Issue orders via web UI
items: Fleet panel 'Add Waypoint' button now submits to the server (closes #35, #36)
Waypoints persist across game-state refreshes while the session is running
Planet panel now shows an 'Add to Queue' section for owned planets (closes #40, #43)
Select a structure or ship design and quantity, then click Add to append to the production queue
Success and error feedback shown as a brief toast notification
